message:
test: add mixed-case Status/IssueType JSONL import regression tests (beads_rust-g2w3)

6 tests covering case-insensitive deserialization through import/export:
- mixed-case known Status values normalize (OPEN→Open, In_Progress→InProgress, etc.)
- mixed-case known IssueType values normalize (Bug→Bug, FEATURE→Feature, etc.)
- export round-trip produces lowercase canonical output
- content hash is identical regardless of input casing
- Custom status preserves original case through DB round-trip
- Custom issue type preserves original case through DB round-trip

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
